summary: Completed comprehensive testing of florist e-commerce website. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend core functionality works well including homepage, product catalog, user authentication, admin dashboard, and subscription pages.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile filter toggle not visible on desktop view (expected behavior)

integration_issues.issue: Session-based cart may not persist across page reloads without user login

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero, categories, and featured products
Product catalog page with filters and sorting
